Data Mine Anomaly Detection

Machine LearningAnomaly DetectionData SciencePurdue Data Mine

Last updated: 2026-03-20

Machine learning anomaly detection research project through the Purdue Data Mine learning community.

Applying machine learning methods for identifying anomalous patterns in datasets. The project focuses on building and evaluating detection models, understanding false positive rates, and developing practical approaches for real-world anomaly detection scenarios.

More details forthcoming as the project progresses.
